documentNo.reason: Auto-sequenced document number; read-only to the user (generated by NEO on POST).

documentType.reason: Hidden from the form but still defaulted under the hood (DocBaseType='GLJ') — needed for posting/sequencing later.

opening.reason: Kept (cheap boolean) per spec — marks an opening-balance journal.

multigeneralLedger.reason: Kept (cheap boolean) per spec — multi-ledger flag.

businessPartner.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

product.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

project.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

costCenter.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

asset.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

salesCampaign.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

stDimension.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

ndDimension.reason: Header accounting dimension — not part of the simplified 7-field header form.

rate.reason: CurrencyRate — derived from currency/period, not user-edited.

posted.reason: Posting status — hidden under the hood. Posting itself is deferred to workstream D.

documentAction.reason: DocAction button — posting/complete flow deferred to workstream D.

accountingSchema.reason: Required by gl_journal_multiacct_check; auto-injected from session $C_AcctSchema_ID by GlJournalHeaderHandler when Multi_Gl=N.

totalDebitAmount.reason: Header debit total — replaced by the live balanceFooter (Σ debit).

totalCreditAmount.reason: Header credit total — replaced by the live balanceFooter (Σ credit).

controlAmount.reason: Control amount — not used in the simplified UI.

currencyRateType.reason: Currency rate type — multi-currency rate handling out of scope for V1.

gLCategory.reason: Posting/accounting classification — not surfaced in the simplified UI.

postingType.reason: Posting-only dimension — posting deferred to workstream D.

documentStatus.reason: Document status — completion/posting flow deferred to workstream D.

lineNo.label: LineNo
lineNo.reason: Line number — auto-sequenced, shown read-only as a grid column.

gLItems.reason: Multi-G/L account selector (Account_ID) — only relevant when Multi-General Ledger is on; out of scope for the simplified single-ledger journal.

accountingCombination.label: Account
accountingCombination.reason: Accounting combination (C_ValidCombination_ID) selector — the line's Account column.

foreignCurrencyDebit.reason: Debit amount (AmtSourceDr) — drives the balanceFooter Σ debit. Entering a value clears credit (mutually exclusive).

foreignCurrencyCredit.reason: Credit amount (AmtSourceCr) — drives the balanceFooter Σ credit. Entering a value clears debit (mutually exclusive).

businessPartner.reason: Open-Items dimension — form-only, shown only when the line's Open Items checkbox is ticked.

product.reason: Open-Items dimension — form-only, shown only when the line's Open Items checkbox is ticked.

project.reason: Open-Items dimension — form-only, shown only when the line's Open Items checkbox is ticked.

activity.reason: Extra accounting dimension not requested for the simplified line editor.

salesCampaign.reason: Extra accounting dimension not requested for the simplified line editor.

salesRegion.reason: Extra accounting dimension not requested for the simplified line editor.

stDimension.reason: Extra accounting dimension not requested for the simplified line editor.

ndDimension.reason: Extra accounting dimension not requested for the simplified line editor.

asset.reason: Open-Items dimension — form-only, shown only when the line's Open Items checkbox is ticked.

costCenter.reason: Open-Items dimension — form-only, shown only when the line's Open Items checkbox is ticked.

debit.reason: AmtAcctDr — posting-derived accounted debit, hidden from the user.

credit.reason: AmtAcctCr — posting-derived accounted credit, hidden from the user.

rate.reason: Line currency rate — derived, not user-edited.

openItems.reason: Open Items checkbox — lives in the side-panel line editor; toggling it reveals the per-line dimensions (businessPartner/product/project/costCenter/asset). Not required — false/unchecked is a valid state.

aPRMAddPayment.reason: Add Payment button (EM_Aprm_Addpayment) — payment integration dropped for V1.

gLItem.reason: Financial G/L item (C_Glitem_ID) — tied to payment integration, dropped for V1.
